summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LearnHub frontend flows - backend APIs 100% functional, frontend core features working but JWT token persistence issue persists causing frequent session timeouts

ui_bugs.issue: Input fields not responding to fill commands - may be focus/interaction issue

integration_issues.issue: Sessions still expire very quickly (within minutes) despite localStorage Bearer token implementation, causing frequent redirects to login page during navigation
integration_issues.impact: Users cannot navigate between pages without re-authenticating frequently - same issue as iteration_1

integration_issues.issue: ADD TASK button present but modal form not opening or functioning properly
ASK QUESTION button present but modal form not opening or functioning properly

passed_tests: Landing page renders correctly with hero section and navigation
Login flow: admin@learnhub.com / Admin@123 works, redirects to dashboard
Dashboard shows proper stats grid (XP: 0, Lessons: 0, Badges: 0, etc.)
Code Sandbox: Monaco editor loads, RUN CODE button functional, output panel present
Badges page: Shows badge grid with 6 badges (First Step, Quick Learner, Knowledge Seeker, etc.)
Study Planner: Page loads with TODO/IN PROGRESS/DONE columns layout
Q&A Forum: Page loads with existing questions and proper layout
Sidebar navigation: All pages accessible, active page highlighting works
Registration page: Loads with proper form fields and CREATE ACCOUNT button
All 24 Backend APIs working: auth, courses, progress, badges, planner, forum, sandbox, AI
Dark theme with 3-color palette (#0A0A0A, #FFFFFF, #FACC15) implemented correctly
Responsive design and proper layout structure
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix JWT token persistence issue - sessions still expire too quickly despite localStorage Bearer token implementation. Users get logged out within minutes during normal navigation. Also fix modal forms for ADD TASK and ASK QUESTION functionality. The token persistence issue is blocking full frontend testing and user experience.
